title: USGS Climate Adaptation Science Centers
description: A USGS source card about climate adaptation research and regional environmental decisions.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS Climate Adaptation Science Centers connect research about climate impacts with decisions about wildlife, water, ecosystems, and communities.
Use this source for older-student nonfiction about applied science, regional case studies, evidence, uncertainty, and community decision-making.
USGS materials are generally public domain, but check item pages for partner contributions, photographs, and media credits before reuse.
